notes: Clarify LLM-related settings around Model & Connection, Default Output, and Quick Rewrite.
Make quick rewrite actions operate on the final pasted output instead of the raw ASR transcript.

Fix Output Translation not producing translated text when the provider is set to Apple Translation. The apple provider was not wired into the output-translation pipeline, so it silently fell back to the un-translated text. Apple Translation now runs on-device without requiring an LLM profile.
